media.description:
A friend from the neighborhood I grew up in, recently wrote on one of my posts: "You're a battery that never needs to recharge. You never stop! You have been like that, all your life! Full of energy and very smart." 🤗 Aww! Thank you Pahola! 💞 The truth is that I'm mad. With everything that has happened to me, I concluded that "Life is a bitch." It's my daily goal to show life that I'll always be the bigger bitch. 💪💯 - I smile because it's my game, my rules! No compromises! Period! 🎯 BUONGIORNO!!! 😘😘

#NancyTiscareno
